data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that support must be available before and after the main appointment. However, the linked use case indicates that a stylist's availability is contingent on front desk coverage, but it does not provide concrete evidence that time offsets are enforced in the system. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary dependency rules and their enforcement are not evidenced.
gaps: Time offsets (support must be available before/after the main appointment) are not evidenced as being implemented or enforced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for time offsets enforcement
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the enforcement of time offsets.
